hooks.command: bash -c 'TYPE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP "(feat|fix|refactor|perf|build|docs|chore|style|ci|test)(?=[\s(:])" | head -1); case "$TYPE" in docs|chore|style|ci|test) exit 0;; esac; if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -q "^CHANGES.md$"; then exit 0; else echo "CHANGES.md is not staged. Significant commits (feat/fix/refactor/perf/build) require a changelog entry. Update CHANGES.md and stage it before committing."; exit 2; fi'
